$description: Component tokens for Toggle switch component with pressed (checked) and unpressed (unchecked) states across 3 sizes (sm, md, lg). Includes default, hover, focus, disabled, and error states. Figma Reference: Node ID 26953-5957

$component.name: Toggle
$component.description: A toggle switch component for binary on/off states. Consists of a track (container) and a thumb (sliding button). Supports multiple sizes, states, and error validation.
$component.structure: Track container with rounded background, containing a thumb element that slides between positions. Track changes color based on pressed state, thumb maintains consistent appearance.

sizes.sm: 16px height, 28px width - Small size for compact interfaces, thumb size 12px
sizes.md: 20px height, 36px width - Medium size (commonly used default), thumb size 16px
sizes.lg: 24px height, 44px width - Large size for prominent toggles, thumb size 20px

variants.unpressed: Toggle in off/unchecked state with neutral background colors
variants.pressed: Toggle in on/checked state with primary blue background colors

usage.contexts: Settings panels, forms, feature toggles, preferences, configuration screens, data entry interfaces
usage.features: Binary state switching, focus indicators, hover feedback, disabled state, error validation, size variants

sm.description: Toggle track height for sm size - 16px

lg.description: Toggle track height for lg size - 24px

lg.description: Toggle track width for lg size - 44px

md.description: Fully rounded border radius for md toggle track

lg.description: Fully rounded border radius for lg toggle track
